mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, publisher_username, publisher_id, publish_time, status, content, remark) VALUES (#{title}, #{publisherUsername}, #{publisherId}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, #{content}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE post
title = #{title},
publisher_username = #{publisherUsername},
publisher_id = #{publisherId},
status = #{status},
content = #{content},
remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM post WHERE id IN
#{id}
